title: ononis natrix var. adglutinans
intro: Ononis natrix var. adglutinans, also known as the Burdock-leaved restharrow, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ononis natrix var. adglutinans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
